progress.title: Purchase in progress
progress.description: This screen can follow a successful cash on-ramp once Transak iframe postMessage handling is wired for order completion.

errors.MISSING_ONRAMP_API: Cash deposit is not configured: set onrampSessionApiUrl on the checkout.
errors.ONRAMP_TARGET_NOT_CONFIGURED: Cash deposit target is not configured: set widget.toChain and widget.toToken.
errors.WALLET_NOT_CONNECTED: Connect an Ethereum wallet to deposit with cash.
errors.ONRAMP_INVALID_RESPONSE: Invalid response from onramp server (missing widgetUrl).
errors.ONRAMP_SESSION_FAILED: Could not start Transak session. Try again later.
errors.ONRAMP_SESSION_HTTP: Could not start Transak session ({{status}}). Try again later.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again later.
